summary: Cook County Administrative Hearings ticket summary report through September 2011 showing outstanding violations by department. Columns include department description, number of tickets issued, original amount due, total fines, total paid, and balance due.

Cook County Board of Ethics monthly activity statistics for 2011. Columns include month, training seminars, employees trained, inquiries, new investigations, advisory opinions issued, vendor compliance audits, and year-to-date totals.
Cook County Administrative Hearings top 5 Animal Control violations from September 2011 to March 2012. Columns include violation code, violation text, and number of violations.

Cook County Facilities Management electricity usage at the 1500 Maybrook facility by month from fiscal year 2008 through early 2012. Columns include facility location, fiscal year, month, usage in kWh, and cost.
Cook County Medical Examiner 2009 manner of death by gender and race from the annual report. Columns include manner of death category, sex, race, and count.

Cook County Facilities Management electricity usage at the 2121 Euclid Ave facility by month from fiscal year 2008 through early 2012. Columns include facility location, fiscal year, month, usage in kWh, and cost.
Cook County Office of the President Commission on Women's Issues monthly outreach and workshop activity for 2011. Columns include month and outreach/workshop event counts.
Cook County Medical Examiner 2009 manner of death by age range. Columns include manner of death category, age range, and count.
Cook County GIS dataset of Illinois State Senate district boundaries based on the 2010 Census. Columns include senate district number, district name, and geometry.
Cook County Medical Examiner 2009 manner of death by gender. Columns include manner of death category, sex, and count.

Cook County Budget Management department special purpose fund 2012 year-end expenses and 2013 preliminary estimates. Columns include fund description, approved appropriations, 2012 revenue estimates, year-end expenditure projections, and 2013 department and executive estimates.
Cook County Administrative Hearings top 5 violations across all departments from September 2011 to March 2012. Columns include violation code, violation text, and number of violations.
Cook County fiscal year 2019 preliminary revenue projections by fund. Columns include revenue description, adopted FY18, estimated FY18 year-end, and preliminary FY19 estimate.
Cook County Medical Examiner 2009 deaths attributable to work injuries. Columns include work injury status category, count, and percent.
Cook County Risk Management employee healthcare enrollment by month from 2007 through August 2012. Columns include month and annual employee enrollment counts for 2007 through 2012.
Cook County Office of the President monthly human rights statistics for 2011. Columns include activity type counts by month (January through November).
Cook County GIS dataset of fire protection taxing district boundaries. Columns include agency name, agency description, agency number, and geometry.

Cook County Finance and Administration Q3 2012 performance management goal assessment for maintaining a healthy financial position. Columns include reporting office, 2011 actuals, 2012 target, Q3 year-to-date actuals, target, and variance.
Cook County GIS dataset of political township boundaries. Columns include township name, job number, shape area, shape length, and geometry.
